Resultater per side

Psoriasis- og eksemforbundet er en landsomfattende interesseorganisasjon for personer med psoriasis, atopisk eksem, hidradenitis suppurativa (HS), kronisk urtikaria og psoriasisartritt.

https://hudportalen.no/

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

MODERATE

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="brand theme hudportalen" id="page6437"> <noscript> <iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></ifra
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="h3 text-inherit opacity-100 mw-75ch mb-3">Hva jeg trenger som tillitsvalgt</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>OrganisasjonshÃ¥ndbok</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="d-flex py-0 flex-row justify-content-end text-end"> <ul class="nav flex-nowrap flex-row"> <li class="nav-item dropdown"> <a class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>ScreeningverktÃ¸y</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (41 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://nhi.no/sykdommer/barn/ore-nese-hals/allergisk-nesetetthet" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">allergisk rhinitt</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="brand theme hudportalen" id="page6110"> <noscript> <iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></ifra
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="h4 text-inherit opacity-100 mw-75ch mb-3">Psoriasis- og eksemforbundet</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="d-flex py-0 flex-row justify-content-end text-end"> <ul class="nav flex-nowrap flex-row"> <li class="nav-item dropdown"> <a class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://hudportalen.no/organisasjonen" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Les mer om oss</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="px-0 py-3">Other languages</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (1 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 1 pages]
Avvik: 114 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×70 across article pages)

<svg id="Layer_1" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 89.4 30.3" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <!-- Generator: Adobe Illustrator 29.7.1, SVG Export Plug-In . SVG Version: 2.1.1 Build 8) --> <defs> <styl
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4 (×1 across article pages)

<h4>Engasjert hos Behandlingsreiser til utlandet</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×5 across article pages)

<nav class="d-flex py-0 flex-row justify-content-end text-end"> <ul class="nav flex-nowrap flex-row"> <li class="nav-item dropdown"> <a class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×6 across article pages)

<a href="https://hudportalen.no/organisasjonen" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Les mer om oss</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link) (×4 across article pages)

<a class="nav-link p-2" href="/bli-medlem"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label (×28 across article pages)

<input class="visually-hidden sub-nav-check" id="nav_15245_5656" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation (×1 across article pages)

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute (×1 across article pages)

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WW28J47" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name (×2 across article pages)

<div class="offcanvas-navigation text-uppercase h-100 d-none overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden" role="navigation"> <div class="nav first-nav flex-column h-auto w-100 left-0 top-0 offcanvas-navigation
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button' (×8 across article pages)

<a aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="p-2 nav-link text-nowrap text-decoration-underline-hover fs-6 fw-normal text-regular dropdown-toggle" data-bs-offset="0,0" data-bs-toggle="dropdown
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

python checker.py https://psoriasis.no --max-pages 21 --format html
